# CWE-334 safe: Small Space of Random Values (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-334-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/base64"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func GenerateRegistrationPin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	buf := make([]byte, 32)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, buf); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	pin := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(buf)
	owner := r.URL.Query().Get("owner")
	_, err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO registrations (pin, owner) VALUES (?, ?)", pin, owner)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	return nil
}
